# Baseline reseeded to add method enumeration and reflect the current core API surface.
# The ceiling gate now records exported methods on exported receiver types in addition
# to top-level exported declarations. Methods are recorded as pkg#RecvType.Method.
# This baseline reflects the post-V-1 internal/core state (top-level decls + methods).
#
# From this point the baseline is FROZEN for TUI work. Any new exported symbol
# from internal/core/** not present here fails the ceiling gate. Escalate to
# principal-go to extend.
#
# Lines beginning with '#' are comments and are ignored by the ceiling test.
# Format: <import-path>#<exported-name> or <import-path>#<RecvType>.<MethodName>, sorted.
